name: hidden-constraint-scan
triggers: The task text contains restrictive or limiting clauses in a genuine constraint context ('must', 'cannot', 'never', 'only', 'except', 'at most', 'forbidden', 'not allowed')
The task text is long enough (over ~150 words) that mid-prompt constraints drop out of attention
An explicit output-format or length directive is present ('in 200 words', 'JSON only', 'format: ...')
The draft violates a constraint stated verbatim in the task text
counterindications: Short task (under ~50 words) with no restrictive language; the scan adds pure overhead
Constraints already extracted into a checklist this session and being checked
